command.description: Updated via xAPI to prove backend works

request.query: mutation ChangeWishlist($command: InputChangeWishlistType!) { changeWishlist(command: $command) { id name description scope } }

changeWishlist.name: AGENT-TEST-QA-Probe-007-02-UPDATED
changeWishlist.description: Updated via xAPI to prove backend works

verdict: BACKEND_WORKS — xAPI changeWishlist mutation accepts and persists list updates for the same user whose Settings dialog fields are disabled when opened from the detail page. BUG-007-02 is UI-only and only affects the dialog-opened-from-detail-page path; the dialog-opened-from-card-kebab path is unaffected. Suggests the disabled state is bound to a Vue ref/prop that the detail page is passing differently (likely `disabled = true` while loading or always).
